channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: DeSantis, Florida GOP tensions spill out into open
item.description: Tensions are spilling out into the open between Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis (R) and members of his own party in the Sunshine State, pointing to a new discordant era of GOP-led politics in a state that has trended red over the last few cycles.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rubio is holding talks in Panama as Trump demands canal control and pressures US neighbors
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is meeting Panama's president on his first stop on his trip foreign trip as President Donald Trump is upping pressure on America's neighbors including a demand for the Panama Canal to be returned to the United States.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Lee, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Elon Musk's DOGE commission gains access to sensitive Treasury payment systems: AP sources
item.description: The Department of Government Efficiency, run by President Donald Trump’s billionaire adviser and Tesla CEO Elon Musk, has gained access to sensitive Treasury data including Social Security and Medicare customer payment systems.
item.dc:creator: Fatima Hussein, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Democrats accused of corruption look to Trump for clemency
item.description: Democrats accused of corruption are seeking relief from President Trump as he hands out scores of pardons and drops charges against his political allies amid his crusade against the justice system that made him a convicted felon.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ken Martin elected next DNC chair
item.description: Minnesota state party chair Ken Martin was elected on Saturday as the next leader of the Democratic National Committee (DNC) after securing a majority of the 448 DNC committee members’ votes.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Reagan National Airport has bothered lawmakers for years, but quick access to power has stalled change
item.description: Ronald Reagan National Airport has raised safety concerns for years, but its close proximity to power in Washington, D.C., has kept the runways open with no sign of change.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Two front-runners remain in DNC chair race
item.description: The two front-runners in the chair's race are Ken Martin, chair of the Minnesota Democratic-Farmer-Labor Party, and Ben Wikler, chair of the Wisconsin Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Koppell, NewsNation

item.title: Air traffic controllers union responds to Trump's DEI attacks
item.description: The air traffic controllers union responded Friday to claims by President Trump this week that diversity programs contributed to the fatal crash in Washington Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Giorno, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Immigration crackdown in Texas: What you need to know about your rights
item.description: Recent enforcement operations across Texas have raised concerns among undocumented immigrants. Here’s what immigration attorneys want you to know about your rights and resources.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By María Méndez, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump says plane crash remarks won’t blunt investigation
item.description: President Trump said Friday that his remarks on the investigation into the deadly midair collision earlier this week near Reagan Washington National Airport does not stand to impact the probe, expressing confidence that his take on the situation is accurate.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Politics Friday: Democrats seek a new leader with Minnesota’s DFL party chair
item.description: MPR News politics editor and host Brian Bakst and his guests talk about the Democratic National Committee’s election of a new party chair and the Minnesotan who’s campaigning for the job. Later, a conversation with newly elected Minnesota Republican Party Chair Alex Plechash.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst and Matthew Alvarez, MPR News

item.title: Trump makes his first moves on education, but no McMahon hearing in sight
item.description: President Trump made his first major moves on education Wednesday, signing a series of executive orders that come even before his nominee to lead the Education Department, Linda McMahon, has had her Senate confirmation hearing.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, NewsNation

item.title: Trump’s FCC chief opens investigation into NPR and PBS
item.description: Brendan Carr, the new head of the Federal Communications Commission under President Trump, says the public broadcasters are being investigated for allegedly running commercials.
item.dc:creator: David Folkenflik, MPR News

item.title: Senator calls RFK Jr.’s position on race and vaccines dangerous
item.description: In one of the most tense exchanges in a heated confirmation hearing, Senator Angela Alsobrooks called out past comments RFK Jr. made suggesting a different vaccine schedule for Black people.
item.dc:creator: Will Stone, MPR News

item.title: Why some Minnesota law enforcement agencies will not follow Trump’s mass deportation plan
item.description: Besides laws which prevent local police from enforcing immigration law, some officials say they don’t have the resources to take on additional tasks.
item.dc:creator: Cari Spencer, MPR News

item.title: Missouri woman pardoned for Jan. 6 offenses sentenced in deadly drunken-driving crash
item.description: Emily Hernandez, a Missouri woman pardoned after her ties to the Jan. 6, 2021, insurrection at the U.S. Capitol, was sentenced Wednesday in connection with a drunken-driving crash.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, Fox 5

item.title: FCC chair launches investigation into NPR, PBS
item.description: The chairman of the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) is launching an investigation into NPR and PBS over their alleged "airing of commercials.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Trump warns Canada, Mexico tariffs are coming on Saturday
item.description: "We’ll be announcing the tariffs on Canada and Mexico for a number of reasons," Trump told reporters in the Oval Office.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: President Trump casts blame during briefing on deadly plane crash
item.description: President Donald Trump started Thursday’s press briefing with a moment of silence for the victims and their families after a deadly crash involving an American Airlines plane and an Army helicopter near Ronald Reagan National Airport on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Connell, Fox 5

item.title: Trump blames diversity hiring as probe into deadly D.C. plane crash begins
item.description: As the nation reeled from the deadliest American aviation disaster in more than two decades, President Donald Trump on Thursday baselessly blamed diversity initiatives for undermining air safety and questioned the actions of a U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump's FBI director pick, Kash Patel, faces confirmation hearing
item.description: Kash Patel, President Donald Trump's pick to run the FBI, answers questions Thursday in a public hearing before the Senate Judiciary Committee.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Lucas, MPR News

item.title: Trump order cracks down on antisemitism and could deport foreign student protesters
item.description: The executive order directs government agencies to use all available tools to prosecute or remove perpetrators of antisemitic harassment and violence, especially on college campuses.
item.dc:creator: Tovia Smith, MPR News

item.title: Trump signs Laken Riley Act, marking first legislative win of second term
item.description: President Trump on Wednesday signed the Laken Riley Act into law, marking his first legislative victory since he returned to the White House after he campaigned on immigration and the border during his 2024 campaign.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: White House budget office rescinds federal funding freeze memo
item.description: The Trump administration’s Office of Management and Budget released a new memo Wednesday rescinding a controversial memo issued late Monday that froze a wide swath of federal financial assistance, which had paralyzed many federal programs and caused a huge uproar on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Nevada Supreme Court declines to dismiss 'fake electors' appeal
item.description: The Nevada Supreme Court has declined to dismiss an appeal involving the six Republicans charged after falsely claiming President Donald Trump won the 2020 election.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NJ congressman launches plan to tackle rising meat and egg prices
item.description: FORT LEE, N.J. (PIX11) -- Food prices in the coming year are expected to continue to increase, according to the Department of Agriculture. It's unlikely to be the sharp rise we saw in the past few years, but certain products such as eggs and meats continue to rise more than most other groceries.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: Florida Republicans end DeSantis special session before calling their own
item.description: Lawmakers in Tallahassee on Monday abruptly ended a special session called by Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis to address illegal immigration and other issues.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC
